2. Patients who have active prescriptions for anticoagulants (warfarin, apixaban), antiarrhythmic medications (amiodarone), or rate-control agents (metoprolol) commonly used for AF

I need the union of both groups to get the complete picture.

## FHIR Queries for AF Quality Measure — Complete Patient Identification

---

### Query 1 — Atrial Fibrillation Diagnosis on Problem List
*(SNOMED CT + full ICD-10-CM AF subtype hierarchy; active problem-list entries only)*

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|49436004,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.0,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.11,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.19,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.20,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.21,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.91&category=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category|problem-list-item&clinical-status=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical|active&_include=Condition:patient
```

---

### Query 2 — Active Prescriptions: Anticoagulants (Warfarin + Apixaban)

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|11289,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1364430&status=active&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

---

### Query 3 — Active Prescriptions: Antiarrhythmic (Amiodarone)

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|703&status=active&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

---

### Query 4 — Active Prescriptions: Rate Control (Metoprolol — both salt forms)

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|41493,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|29046&status=active&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

---

## Code Mapping Reference

| Query | Resource | Code System | Code(s) | Clinical Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Condition | SNOMED CT | `49436004` | Atrial fibrillation (broad concept) |
| 1 | Condition | ICD-10-CM | `I48.0` | Paroxysmal AF |
| 1 | Condition | ICD-10-CM | `I48.11` | Longstanding persistent AF |
| 1 | Condition | ICD-10-CM | `I48.19` | Other persistent AF |
| 1 | Condition | ICD-10-CM | `I48.20` | Chronic AF, unspecified |
| 1 | Condition | ICD-10-CM | `I48.21` | Permanent AF |
| 1 | Condition | ICD-10-CM | `I48.91` | Unspecified AF |
| 2 | MedicationRequest | RxNorm | `11289` | Warfarin (ingredient) |
| 2 | MedicationRequest | RxNorm | `1364430` | Apixaban (ingredient) |
| 3 | MedicationRequest | RxNorm | `703` | Amiodarone (ingredient) |
| 4 | MedicationRequest | RxNorm | `41493` | Metoprolol succinate (ingredient) |
| 4 | MedicationRequest | RxNorm | `29046` | Metoprolol tartrate (ingredient) |

---

## Important Implementation Notes

> **Union Logic:** FHIR does not natively produce a cross-query union. You must deduplicate patients by `Patient.id` across all four result sets in your application layer or analytics pipeline.

> **`_include=...:patient`** pulls the linked `Patient` resource into each bundle so you have demographics alongside the matching Condition/MedicationRequest — critical for building your denominator list.

> **Ingredient-level RxNorm codes** (used in Queries 2–4) match across all branded products and formulations (e.g., Coumadin® → warfarin `11289`, Eliquis® → apixaban `1364430`, Lopressor®/Toprol-XL® → both metoprolol codes). If your EHR stores only product-level (SCD/SBD) RxNorm codes, consider supplementing with `MedicationRequest?medication.ingredient-code=` or a server-specific `_text` search.

> **`status=active`** on MedicationRequest intentionally excludes completed, cancelled, and on-hold prescriptions. If you want to catch patients recently transitioned off therapy (e.g., discontinued warfarin before cardioversion), add a second pass with `status=completed` and a `authoredon=ge2025-05-22` date filter.

> **Encounter diagnoses:** If AF was documented as an encounter diagnosis rather than a problem-list item, drop the `category` filter on Query 1, or add a parallel query with `category=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category|encounter-diagnosis`.

## FHIR Queries: Atrial Fibrillation Diagnosis (Inclusion Criteria)

### Query 1 — SNOMED CT (Primary Clinical Terminology)
```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|49436004&_include=Condition:subject
```

### Query 2 — ICD-10-CM (All AF-Specific Subtypes, Encounter & Problem List)
```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.0,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.11,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.19,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.20,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.21,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I48.91&_include=Condition:subject
```

---

### Code Mapping Reference

| Code | System | Description | Included? |
|---|---|---|---|
| `49436004` | SNOMED CT | Atrial fibrillation | ✅ |
| `I48.0` | ICD-10-CM | Paroxysmal atrial fibrillation | ✅ |
| `I48.11` | ICD-10-CM | Longstanding persistent atrial fibrillation | ✅ |
| `I48.19` | ICD-10-CM | Other persistent atrial fibrillation | ✅ |
| `I48.20` | ICD-10-CM | Chronic atrial fibrillation, unspecified | ✅ |
| `I48.21` | ICD-10-CM | Permanent atrial fibrillation | ✅ |
| `I48.91` | ICD-10-CM | Unspecified atrial fibrillation | ✅ |
| `I48.3` / `I48.4` | ICD-10-CM | Typical / Atypical **atrial flutter** | ❌ Excluded |
| `I48.92` | ICD-10-CM | Unspecified **atrial flutter** | ❌ Excluded |

---

### Design Notes

- **`_include=Condition:subject`** pulls the associated `Patient` resource in the same bundle, enabling downstream patient-level cohort assembly
- **No `clinical-status` filter** is applied — per PheKB AF phenotype logic, ever having a documented AF diagnosis qualifies (active, inactive, resolved, or historical)
- **No `category` filter** is applied — captures both `problem-list-item` and `encounter-diagnosis` entries simultaneously
- **Atrial flutter intentionally excluded** — `I48.3`, `I48.4`, and `I48.92` are related but distinct arrhythmias and are omitted from these queries
- Run **both queries** and union the results, then deduplicate by `Patient.id` to build your AF-positive cohort before applying the heart-transplant exclusion step
